source_jobs.title: Director, Social Media Marketing
General Interest Form
source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><h3><span style="font-family: impact, sans-serif;"><strong>WE ARE STARFACE</strong></span></h3>
<p>Since launching in 2019, Starface has turned the historically negative experience of having acne into a more joyful, relatable one with a category of its own: expressive and effective products that make people feel good. With a full suite of hydrocolloid pimple patches in bright colors and a roster of limited-edition collaborations— from fan-favorite characters like Hello Kitty and Snoopy to fashion brands like Marc Jacob’s Heaven—it’s easy to see why Starface users say they look forward to getting breakouts. Featuring award-winning formulas and ultra-cute packaging, Starface products are designed to make you smile every time you use them.</p></div><p>If joining Starface team sounds interesting to you, we’d love to get to know you better! Use this handy form to tell us about yourself. If you need additional assistance please email careers@starfaceworld.com!</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Starface is an Equal Opportunity Employer where the spirit of inclusion feeds into everything that we do.&nbsp; We are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are available to all applicants and teammates.&nbsp; We believe that opportunity, access, resources and rewards should be available to and for the benefit of all.&nbsp; Starface is committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship status, marital status, disability, gender identity, gender expression, and Veteran status.</em></p></div>

source_jobs.title: Manager, Social Art Director

notes: No tech roles posted, mostly marketing and social media positions
